name: Monstrous Crow of the Scarlet Rot
conditionImmunities: Charmed, Dazed, Frightened, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Stunned
description: A towering horror of matted feathers and exposed, tumor-riddled flesh. Its single gleaming eye tracks movement with predatory intelligence while scarlet rot weeps from every wound.

traits.name: Rotting Resilience (3/Day)
traits.description: When the Monstrous Crow fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead. When it does, its speed is halved, it can't take the Disengage action, and it can't use Ruin-Hop until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The Monstrous Crow has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Mimic the Dying
traits.description: The crow can perfectly mimic Corwyn's voice or any creature it has heard. DC 19 Wisdom (Insight) to detect.

traits.name: Kenku Recall
traits.description: The crow remembers every attack used against it. If a creature repeats the same attack type (same spell or same weapon) it already used in a previous round, that attack has disadvantage.

traits.name: Rogue's Instinct
traits.description: Evasion (Dex saves: success = no damage, fail = half). Can Hide as a bonus action. Double proficiency on Stealth (included).

traits.name: Pounce
traits.description: If the crow moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and hits with a Carrion Talon, DC 19 Str save or prone. If prone, crow can make one Rending Beak as a bonus action.

traits.name: Running Leap
traits.description: With a 10-foot running start, long jump up to 30 ft., high jump up to 20 ft.

traits.name: Scarlet Mire Strider
traits.description: Ignores difficult terrain from scarlet rot, ruined stone, corpses, or rubble.

traits.name: Consumed Rot (3/Day)
traits.description: On a successful save, the crow hardens itself. Until end of its next turn, scarlet rot doesn't affect it and it can't be blinded.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The crow makes one Rending Beak and two Carrion Talon attacks. It can replace one Talon with a Snatch.

actions.name: Rending Beak
actions.description: +15 to hit, 15 ft., one target. Hit: 33 (4d12+8) piercing. If Medium or smaller, grappled (escape DC 19) and restrained. Crow can't bite another target while grappling.

actions.name: Carrion Talon
actions.description: +15 to hit, 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8+8) slashing. Can move target up to 15 ft. horizontally (Huge or smaller).

actions.name: Snatch
actions.description: +15 to hit, 10 ft. On hit, DC 19 Dex save or crow steals one held/worn item and drops it in scarlet rot 30 ft. away. Action to retrieve.

actions.name: Blightshriek (Recharge 5–6)
actions.description: 90 ft. line, 20 ft. wide. DC 19 Con save or 28 (8d6) poison + 2 Scarlet Rot stacks (half, 1 stack on save). Area becomes scarlet rot terrain for 1 min.

actions.name: Wing Gust (Recharge 5–6)
actions.description: 60 ft. cone. DC 19 Str save or 24 (7d6) bludgeoning + pushed 30 ft. + prone (half, no push on save). Ranged attacks through area have disadvantage until end of crow's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Discordant Squawk
bonusActions.description: All enemies within 60 ft.: DC 19 Int save or -2 attack rolls until start of crow's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Bloodmist Veil
bonusActions.description: One creature within 120 ft. DC 19 Dex save or lightly obscured to itself + 1 Scarlet Rot stack. Until start of crow's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Ruin-Hop
bonusActions.description: Leaps up to half speed without provoking. Must end on rubble, architecture, or in scarlet rot.

bonusActions.name: Phantom Wall (Illusion)
bonusActions.description: Creates 20×20 ft. illusory wall within 120 ft. DC 19 Investigation (action) to see through. Lasts 1 min or until used again.

reactions.name: Feint
reactions.description: Trigger: Hit by melee. Feigns a stagger. Ask next player: 'The crow looks stunned — do you want to take advantage?' If they attack with advantage, crow makes auto-hit Rending Beak.

reactions.name: Spoil the Cure
reactions.description: Trigger: Creature within 60 ft. regains HP. DC 19 Con save or half healing + 1 Scarlet Rot stack.

reactions.name: Snatch and Grab
reactions.description: Trigger: Creature within 10 ft. casts with focus/component. DC 19 Dex save or crow steals focus. Spell fails (slot not expended).

legendaryActions.name: Ruin-Hop (1)
legendaryActions.description: Leap up to half speed without provoking.

legendaryActions.name: Wing Buffet (2)
legendaryActions.description: Each creature within 15 ft: DC 19 Dex save or 12 (2d6+5) bludgeoning, pushed 10 ft., +1 Scarlet Rot stack. Crow can Ruin-Hop (free).

legendaryActions.name: Blinding Bile (3)
legendaryActions.description: Spit bile at one creature within 60 ft. +15 to hit. Hit: 14 (4d6) poison + 3 Scarlet Rot stacks.

villainActions.name: Villain Action 1 — Stolen Darkness
villainActions.description: Magical Darkness fills the entire lair (300 ft.) until end of crow's next turn. Crow can see through it. Light spells ≤4th suppressed. Crow uses Ruin-Hop (free).

villainActions.name: Villain Action 2 — Rot-Shed Form
villainActions.description: Gains resistance to B/P/S, can move through creatures/objects (difficult terrain) until end of next turn. Creatures it passes through: DC 19 Con save or 2 Scarlet Rot stacks. Teleports 120 ft. Makes one Snatch (free).

villainActions.name: Villain Action 3 — Death Throes Mimicry
villainActions.description: Trigger: 100 HP or below. DC 19 Wis save or stunned (believes they're killing Corwyn). Crow makes full Multiattack targeting stunned first. Success = immune.

hitFlavor: The blow crunches through matted feathers, spattering scarlet ichor.
Steel bites into diseased flesh — the crow shrieks, a sound like tearing metal.
The strike connects with a wet thud. Something inside the crow ruptures and leaks red mist.
Your weapon sinks deep. The wound immediately begins weeping scarlet rot.
missFlavor: The crow twists with impossible speed, your strike slicing only air and rot-mist.
It hops aside on those grotesque legs — faster than anything that size should move.
Your weapon passes through a cloud of scarlet mist where the crow was a heartbeat ago.
The crow flicks a wing almost lazily, deflecting the blow with a shower of diseased feathers.
